data.title: Nasdaq 100 Index Rises Over 1% Amid Intel and ASML Stock Gains
data.description: According to ChainCatcher, the Nasdaq 100 Index experienced an increase of over 1%. Intel's stock price surged by 10.4%, while ASML's American Depositary Receipts (ADR) rose by 6.9%.

data.title: Iran Internet Blackout Freezes Crypto Access as Protests Escalate
data.description:
Iran imposed a nationwide internet shutdown on Thursday, January 8, as economic protests intensified across the country. The blackout has sharply curtailed digital activity, leaving millions of residents unable to access online services, including cryptocurrency platforms.
source: https://www.ethnews.com/iran-internet-blackout-freezes-crypto-access-as-protests-escalate/

data.title: Bitcoin Transfer to Jump Crypto Observed
data.description: According to ChainCatcher, data from Arkham indicates that at 02:18, a total of 108.92 BTC was transferred from an anonymous address, beginning with 12YGEm, to Jump Crypto.

data.title: BNY Mellon’s tokenized deposits go live with ICE, Citadel, Ripple and Circle participation
data.description:
BNY Mellon has rolled out a new tokenized deposit service that lets clients send money using blockchain rails instead of old banking pipes. The setup places real bank deposits on-chain while the cash stays inside client accounts. The cash will reportedly mirror deposits clients already hold at BNY Mellon, not a separate token floating around. […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/bny-mellons-tokenized-deposits-go-live/
